text: Lambda In-depth PART3 - Versions @ wsumncus @ s * Lambda functions have versions - v1, v2, v3 .... e Aversion is the code + the configuration of the lambda function e [t's immutable - it never changes once published & has its own vn Amazon Resource Name e $Latest points at the latest version e Aliases (DEV, STAGE, PROD) point at a version - can be changed
